name: Klevu
description: Klevu — AI-native search and product discovery platform for Shopify and other e-commerce platforms.

seo.title: Klevu — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Klevu: Klevu — AI-native search and product discovery platform for Shopify and other e-commerce platforms.

when_to_use: AI-native search for Shopify and BigCommerce stores
Product discovery API with semantic understanding
Relevance tuning for fashion and apparel e-commerce
Personalized search results based on shopper history
Category merchandising with AI-ranked product listings

pros: AI-native ranking tuned specifically for e-commerce intent
Tight Shopify integration with one-click install
Natural language search handles long-tail queries well
Merchandising UI accessible to non-technical marketers
cons: Pricing scales aggressively with catalog and traffic
Headless implementations need more custom work
Less flexible than Algolia for custom search UIs
review.verdict: Strong Shopify-first AI search for merchants who want conversion lift without running ML themselves.
review.best_for: Mid-size Shopify merchants wanting AI product discovery with minimal dev work.
review.not_for: Headless setups, content sites, or teams needing deep custom ranking.
